theme_and_archetype.vibe: Industrial, operational, clear, serious, high-contrast, robust
theme_and_archetype.rationale: B2B SaaS dashboard for construction procurement teams requiring clear data hierarchy, authority, and functional beauty with a distinctive industrial edge.

rules.hover_states: hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white for primary, hover:bg-gray-100 for secondary
rules.tinted_grey: Use cool grays (slate/gray tailwind palette) to keep it industrial.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-1, p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (Generous padding inside distinct containers)

grid_system.mode: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
grid_system.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors. No jagged bottoms.

borders_and_radius.radius: rounded-sm (max 4px) to maintain a sharp, industrial, architectural feel.
borders_and_radius.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts where possible with 1px subtle borders (border-border).

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized for industrial look. Go cardless or rectangular/dense styles.

specific_overrides.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
specific_overrides.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), high contrast. Primary: bg-gray-900 text-white. Secondary: border border-gray-300 bg-transparent text-gray-900.
specific_overrides.inputs: Solid borders, square-ish radius, clear focus rings (ring-orange-500).
specific_overrides.tables: Dense, striped rows or solid borders separating rows (border-b), mono font for numerical data.
specific_overrides.tabs: h-auto, simple underline or flat block style, no pills.

components.charts: Shadcn chart components (Recharts) with monochromatic palettes + safety orange highlight for key metrics.
components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Construction worker/engineer profile or testimonial avatar.
Black and white architectural buildings photo, used for login page split screen background.
Coiled steel rebar, used as a placeholder image for inventory items or procurement requests.
Abstract geometric shapes in neutral tones, good for empty states or dashboard banners.

media.rules: NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). ALWAYS use the provided images. Map these URLs accurately to components.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the typography and layout rules defined.
Ensure all dashboard widgets stretch to fill grid height.
Do not use generic SaaS purple or blue gradients; stick to the high-contrast B&W industrial palette with Orange/Yellow accents.
Implement pure Shadcn components customized with tight borders, rounded-sm, and no soft drop-shadows (unless specified).
Implement data-testid on every interactive element.
Use standard JS files (.js/.jsx) as this is a JS project.
